channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Blinken heads to last G7 meeting of Biden presidency with Ukraine and Mideast topping the agenda
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Secretary of State Antony Blinken is leaving Saturday on a diplomatic trip to Europe that includes a meeting of foreign ministers from the leading industrialized nations that will focus on the wars in Ukraine and the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NATO head and Trump meet in Florida for talks on global security
item.description: BRUSSELS (AP) — U.S. President-elect Donald Trump and the head of NATO have met for talks on global security, the military alliance said Saturday. In a brief statement, NATO said Trump and its secretary general, Mark Rutte, met on Friday in Palm Beach, Florida.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Driver in crash that killed 4 kids was allegedly photographing ‘Welcome to Florida’ sign
item.description: A New York man was extradited to Florida this month after he was accused of causing a deadly crash when he came to a near-stop on Interstate 95 to take photo of the "Welcome to Florida" sign.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WGN 9

item.title: Trump names Seb Gorka, Alex Wong to be senior national security staff
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped his first term alums Alex Wong and Sebastian Gorka to join his national security team for his second go-around.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, NewsNation

item.title: Voters rejected historic election reforms across the US, despite more than $100M push
item.description: JEFFERSON CITY, Mo. (AP) — Two weeks before Election Day, activists from across the country gathered for an online rally heralding the historic number of state ballot initiatives seeking to change the way people vote.
item.dc:creator: DAVID A. LIEB, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jelly Roll pays tribute to Oklahoma teen who died from fentanyl
item.description: The 19-year-old died from a fentanyl overdose in May 2023, while attending Cameron University. Rain, who thought she was taking a Xanax, turned out the pill was laced with fentanyl.
item.dc:creator: Mario Gonzalez/KFOR, KREX 5

item.title: Colorado funeral home owners who let nearly 190 bodies decay plead guilty to corpse abuse
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (AP) — The owners of a Colorado funeral home who let nearly 190 bodies decay in a room-temperature building and gave grieving families fake ashes pleaded guilty on Friday to corpse abuse.
item.dc:creator: JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump taps NFL player Scott Turner as head of HUD
item.description: Turner serves as the chair of the Center for Education Opportunity at America First Policy Institute, a Trump-aligned think tank.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KREX 5

item.title: Unsolved Ohio: Columbus woman missing for nearly seven years
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) – A direct message that said "You can unlock the door, I'm close" is the last known communication from a woman who disappeared while walking to a friend's Columbus home nearly seven years ago. LeShay Dungey was 19 years old when she vanished on Jan. 24, 2018.
item.dc:creator: Ava Boldizar, NewsNation

item.title: Trump selects former Florida Rep. Dave Weldon to lead CDC
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump tapped former Florida Rep. Dave Weldon (R) to serve as the director for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) during his upcoming administration. "I am thrilled to announce that former Congressman, Dr.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: McDonald's unveils new value menu, extends $5 Meal Deal
item.description: The fast-food giant announced on Friday that it will launch a new everyday value menu on Jan. 7, 2025, which will include exclusive in-app offers, a new Buy One, Add One offer, and the popular $5 Meal Deal.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KRON4

item.title: Trump expected to name investor Scott Bessent as Treasury secretary pick
item.description: Bessent, founder and CEO of hedge fund Key Square Group, served as an economic adviser to the Trump campaign, often appearing on financial talk shows to argue in favor of the president-elect's economic policies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, KRON4

item.title: Texas education board approves optional Bible-infused curriculum for elementary schools
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas’ education board voted Friday to allow Bible-infused teachings in elementary schools under optional new curriculum that could test boundaries between religion and public classrooms in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN and KENDRIA LAFLEUR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Louisiana lawmakers pass income and corporate tax cuts, raising statewide sales tax to pay for it
item.description: Louisiana’s GOP-dominated legislature passed tax cuts on personal and corporate income on Friday in exchange for a statewide sales tax increase.
item.dc:creator: Jack Brook, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Supreme Court steps into fight over FCC's $8 billion subsidies for internet and phone services
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Friday stepped into a major legal fight over the $8 billion a year the federal government spends to subsidize phone and internet services in schools, libraries and rural areas, in a new test of federal regulatory power.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas approves optional Bible-based lessons for public schools
item.description: Texas gave final approval Friday to optional biblical lesson plans for kindergarten through 5th grade classes in state public schools.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KRON4

item.title: ICE arrests alleged child sex predator, MS-13 gang member in Massachusetts
item.description: ICE officers operating in Massachusetts have arrested an alleged child sexual predator and MS-13 gang member in the last two weeks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 Utah children missing since 2022 found living with FLDS Church, returned to mother
item.description: Three Utah children missing for two years have been located living with members of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, according to the Fredonia Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, KRON4

item.title: The 61st anniversary of JFK's assassination
item.description: More than six decades since the assassination of President John F. Kennedy, questions remain as to what truly occurred.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: New York judge calls off Trump hush money sentencing
item.description: President-elect Trump’s sentencing in his New York criminal case will not go forward as planned next week as his attorneys push to dismiss the prosecution following his election victory. Judge Juan Merchan, who oversees the trial proceedings, announced the adjournment in a letter Friday.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Emperor penguin who swam to Australia released 20 days after waddling onto beach
item.description: The only emperor penguin known to have swum from Antarctica to Australia was released at sea 20 days after he waddled ashore on a popular tourist beach
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alabama carries out nation’s third nitrogen gas execution on a man for a hitchhiker's killing
item.description: ATMORE, Ala. (AP) — An Alabama man convicted in the 1994 killing of a hitchhiker cursed at the prison warden and made obscene gestures with his hands shortly before he was put to death Thursday evening in the nation’s third execution using nitrogen gas.
item.dc:creator: KIM CHANDLER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Canoeist is paddling the 6,000-mile Great Loop out of gratitude for life
item.description: ANNAPOLIS, Md. (AP) — Peter Frank has paddled from Michigan's Upper Peninsula in June to the Chesapeake Bay in Maryland this month in his 1982 Sawyer Loon decked canoe, but he’s still got a long way to go.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Perez Hilton says Jussie Smollett decision won't help 'tanked' career: Court didn't dispute hate crime hoax
item.description: Pop culture expert and crime buff Perez Hilton weighs in on the Illinois Supreme Court's decision to toss the hate crime hoax conviction of Jussie Smollett.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: OpenTable names 2024's 'Top 100 Restaurants' in America
item.description: OpenTable's analysts based their findings on more than 14 million diner reviews, along with diner ratings, reservation demand, and percentage of five-star reviews, among other factors.
item.dc:creator: Mac Bell, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump has promised again to release the last JFK files. But experts say don’t expect big revelations
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — More than 60 years after President John F. Kennedy was assassinated, conspiracy theories still swirl and any new glimpse into the fateful day of Nov. 22, 1963, in Dallas continues to fascinate.
item.dc:creator: JAMIE STENGLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Prolific Mexican cartel leader allegedly faked his own death to live 'life of luxury' in California
item.description: A Mexican cartel leader, who peddled thousands of kilograms of illegal drugs to the U.S., was killed by a business associate for "lying" — or at least that's what the public was told.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Passengers duct tape unruly man who tried to open door on American Airlines plane
item.description: A group of passengers aboard a Dallas-bound flight restrained a man with duct tape after he claimed to be the "captain" and attempted to open the cabin door of an American Airlines plane midair, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Number of women who are state lawmakers inches up to a record high
item.description: Women will for the first time make up a majority of state legislators in Colorado and New Mexico next year, but at least 13 states saw losses in female representation after the November election, according to a count released Thursday by the Rutgers Center for American Women and Politics.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA VOLMERT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Wisconsin man who faked his own kayaking death fled the country and won't come home, officials say
item.description: Borgwardt, 45, was reported missing on Aug. 12 after he failed to return home from kayaking on Big Green Lake, the Green Lake County Sheriff’s Office said at the time.
item.dc:creator: Ben Newhouse, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gaetz withdraws from attorney general consideration
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) has withdrawn his nomination to be Attorney General for President-elect Trump.
item.dc:creator: Ian Swanson, KTLA 5

item.title: US charges one of the world's richest people with fraud
item.description: Indian businessman Gautam Adani, one of the world's richest people, was charged by the U.S. on allegations of fraud.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Assault allegations against Hegseth revealed in police report
item.description: A woman told police that she was sexually assaulted in 2017 by Pete Hegseth after he took her phone, blocked the door to a California hotel room and refused to let her leave, according to a detailed investigative report made public late Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man wins $650K on lottery ticket using numbers tied to late wife
item.description: A Chicago man won a $650,000 Lucky Day Lotto jackpot prize after playing numbers related to his late wife.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, ABC 4

item.title: Ex-student pleads guilty to fatally shooting 3 University of Virginia football players in 2022
item.description: RICHMOND, Va. (AP) — A former University of Virginia student pleaded guilty Wednesday to fatally shooting three football players and wounding two other students on the campus in 2022. Christopher Darnell Jones Jr.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY and DENISE LAVOIE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: NYPD gets a new top cop after months of turmoil. Jessica Tisch is the 2nd woman to lead the force
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Moving to stabilize an administration roiled by investigations, resignations and his own indictment, New York City Mayor Eric Adams on Wednesday appointed sanitation chief Jessica Tisch as police commissioner.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The worst passwords you could have in 2024 — or any year
item.description: Don't rely on easy-to-remember passwords too much — because all of us tend to think more alike than we'd think.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, WGN 9
